kirundi.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — umushakashatsi w'imibare 3D ushingiye ku tubari. Koresha WASD kugira ngo unyure, imbeba kugira ngo urabe, fyonda ibumoso kugira ngo umene utubari, fyonda iburyo kugira ngo ushire utubari.
kirundi.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Ururimi rw'umunyeshure rwo mu rugo ku magambo y'indimi ebyiri za NPC
kirundi.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Ururimi rw'umunyeshure rwo mu rugo — NPC bazavuga indimi ebyiri
kirundi.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Sohora raporo yo gukurikirana iterambere ya MTSS (iciciro c'urwego RTI, amakuru y'igihe kirekire)
kirundi.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Sangiza iyi si mu isomero ry'ishure
kirundi.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Raba isi zasangiwe na bagenzi b'ishure
kirundi.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Sigura ingingo y'isomo rya geometiri ku ikorwa rya AI
kirundi.generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Ubujakuzimu bw'ikorwa: umubare w'inzira za AI
kirundi.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Raba amasomo yabitswe yakozwe na AI
kirundi.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Umurongo wa kompas wa NPC werekana icerekezo gifitanye isano kuri buri NPC uhereye ku cerekezo ca kamera
kirundi.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Ugara ibipfukisho vyose vyafunguwe usubire ku iraba ry'umukino
kirundi.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Ugara ibipfukisho vyose usubire ku mukino wa 3D (canke ufyonde Shift+Esc)
kirundi.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: NPC akwiye kuvuga iki? (urugero "Raba inyubako iri inyuma yanje!")
kirundi.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Amahitamwo y'ibisubizo, atandukanyijwe n'inyuguti y'umurongo uhagaze
kirundi.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Hindura amatangazo y'imisozi y'umusomyi w'ekran (urupfunguzo C)
kirundi.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Hindura uburyo bwo guguruka (canke ufyonde Space inshuro ebyiri)
kirundi.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Siba gusa utubari WEWE washizeho (inyubako z'isomo zigumaho). Ningombwa mu gutangura ubushakashatsi bushasha.
kirundi.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Fyonda kugira ngo wumve ubusobanuro busomwa mu ijwi rirenga
kirundi.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Sigura iki kiganiro na AI (ikoresha icifuzo kimwe ca AI)
kirundi.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, biragoye kuri jewe kwiyumvira ubu. Gerageza kubaza mu bundi buryo!
